note: seq=25 (PLACEHOLDER -- publish renumber/sign/push). STANDALONE OUTREACH SENDER -- SHADOW MODE ONLY (review item 3). The 'sending engine' half of the goal as a standalone service (NOT in WordPress): mailbox pools, sender domains, SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks, warmup schedule, daily caps, provider throttle, reply/bounce/unsubscribe/complaint tables, sequence state, A/B variants, and per-send routing through the compliance gate (item 4, imported as a library). CRITICAL SAFETY -- it GENERATES + COMPLIANCE-CHECKS + QUEUES every send but NEVER TRANSMITS: a hard SHADOW interlock at the single choke-point _transmit() requires ALL of (ATLAS_SENDER_LIVE==1) + (ATLAS_SENDER_LIVE_CONFIRM=='I-AUTHORIZE-LIVE-SEND') + a configured non-brand-root SMTP transport + an ALLOW verdict; the brand root domain is HARD-DENIED as a sender; and EVEN WHEN fully authorized the transmitter ships intentionally UNWIRED (status=live_blocked_pending_user_smtp_wiring) so no default/accidental send is possible. In shadow (the default) _transmit opens NO socket and imports NO smtp client -- sends are recorded status='shadow' in atlas.send_log. Reads ONLY the item-2 atlas.outreach_pool contract + item-3 outreach_eligible rows. ADDITIVE: owns send_log/sequence_state/mailbox_pool/sender_domain/ab_variant + bounce/complaint/unsubscribe tables (read by the gate); never ALTERs other tables, .gov/.mil excluded upstream + re-blocked by the gate. The systemd unit sets NO live env -> the service can only ever run shadow until the USER explicitly authorizes live sending (and must never use the brand root domain). VERIFIED THIS SESSION (sandbox): py_compile clean; --selftest EXIT 0 PROVING shadow sends nothing -- default=SHADOW, LIVE flag alone insufficient, brand-root denied, no-SMTP stays shadow, fully-authorized STILL cannot transmit (unwired), ALLOW-in-shadow -> status='shadow'; plus SPF/DKIM/DMARC + warmup-ramp asserts. SHA-gated fetch + --migrate + --selftest gate; oneshot shadow timer. DO NOT enable real sending.

steps.note: seq=25: standalone outreach sender SHADOW ONLY. Generates+gates+queues, NEVER transmits. Hard interlock; brand-root denied; transmitter ships unwired. User-only flip to live.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/outreach/atlas_outreach_sender.py':'1bdf757cc3c7ee8efbba01627117af184975c10c64bef0258afa1a28295f30ce'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS outreach sender (SHADOW MODE ONLY -- generates+gates+queues, NEVER transmits; no live env set here)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=12
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/outreach/atlas_outreach_sender.py
TimeoutStartSec=30min

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS outreach sender (SHADOW) -- build+gate+queue pass every 30 min; transmits nothing

[Timer]
OnBootSec=10min
OnUnitActiveSec=30min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-outreach-sender.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
